attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
  FID
  ,OPERATING_UNIT
  ,INSTANCE_NAME
  ,CURRENCY
  ,ORG_ID
  ,LEDGER_ID
  ,APPLICATION_NAME
  ,SOURCE
  ,KAFKA_TOPIC_NAME
  ,INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
  ,ITEM_NAME
  ,QUANTITY
  ,ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME
  ,TRX_NUMBER
  ,TRX_CLASS
  ,CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
  ,CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
  ,AMOUNT
  ,ACCOUNTING_RULE_DURATION
  ,UNIT_SELLING_PRICE
  ,CAST((CLAIM_START_DATE(DATE, FORMAT'mm/dd/yyyy')) AS TIMESTAMP(6)) AS CLAIM_START_DATE1
  ,CAST((CLAIM_END_DATE(DATE, FORMAT'mm/dd/yyyy')) AS TIMESTAMP(6)) AS CLAIM_END_DATE1
   ,CAST(ORDER_NUMBER AS INTEGER)  AS ORDER_NUMBER
   ,CAST(ORDER_LINE_ID AS INTEGER) AS ORDER_LINE_ID
  ,OA_FLAG
  ,RECLAIM_VERSION /*Accural change feb release by anusha on 11/01*/
  ,TRX_CURR_CODE
  ,CONVERSION_DATE
  ,OA_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
  ,OA_ATTRIB_ID
  ,OA_ITEM_NAME
  ,OA_QUANTITY
  ,OA_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME
  ,OA_PERCENTAGE
  ,SUB_SKU_AMOUNT
 ,CAST((OA_CLAIM_START_DATE(DATE, FORMAT'mm/dd/yyyy')) AS TIMESTAMP(6)) AS OA_CLAIM_START_DATE1
  ,CAST((OA_CLAIM_END_DATE(DATE, FORMAT'mm/dd/yyyy')) AS TIMESTAMP(6)) AS OA_CLAIM_END_DATE1
  ,OA_ACCOUNTING_RULE_DURATION AS OA_ACCOUNTING_DURATION
  ,CASE WHEN OA_FLAG='N' THEN NULL ELSE COALESCE(OA_SEQUENCE_ID,1) END AS OA_SEQUENCE_ID
   ,COALESCE(SEQUENCE_ID,1) AS SEQUENCE_ID 
  ,CASE WHEN OA_FLAG='N' 
              THEN CAST((GL_DATE(DATE, FORMAT'mm/dd/yyyy')) AS TIMESTAMP(6))
              ELSE CAST((OA_GL_DATE(DATE, FORMAT'mm/dd/yyyy')) AS TIMESTAMP(6)) 
    END AS GL_DATE
  ,CASE WHEN OA_FLAG='N' THEN DEBIT_AMOUNT ELSE OA_DEBIT_AMOUNT  END AS DEBIT_AMOUNT
  ,CASE WHEN OA_FLAG='N' THEN CREDIT_AMOUNT ELSE OA_CREDIT_AMOUNT  END AS CREDIT_AMOUNT
  ,CASE WHEN OA_FLAG='N' THEN DEBIT_ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT ELSE OA_DEBIT_ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT  END AS DEBIT_ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT 
  ,CASE WHEN OA_FLAG='N' THEN CREDIT_ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT ELSE OA_CREDIT_ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT  END AS CREDIT_ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT 
  ,CASE WHEN OA_FLAG='N' THEN GL_TRANSFER_STATUS_CODE ELSE OA_GL_TRANSFER_STATUS_CODE  END AS GL_TRANSFER_STATUS_CODE
  ,CASE WHEN OA_FLAG='N' THEN 
                         CAST((GL_TRANSFER_DATE(DATE, FORMAT'mm/dd/yyyy')) AS TIMESTAMP(6))
                         ELSE 
       CAST((OA_GL_TRANSFER_DATE(DATE, FORMAT'mm/dd/yyyy')) AS TIMESTAMP(6))
   END AS GL_TRANSFER_DATE 
  ,CASE WHEN OA_FLAG='N' THEN DEBIT_CC_ID ELSE OA_DEBIT_CC_ID  END AS DEBIT_CC_ID
  ,CASE WHEN OA_FLAG='N' THEN CREDIT_CC_ID  ELSE OA_CREDIT_CC_ID  END AS CREDIT_CC_ID
  ,CASE WHEN OA_FLAG='N' THEN DEBIT_ACCOUNT_CLASS ELSE OA_DEBIT_ACCOUNT_CLASS  END AS DEBIT_ACCOUNT_CLASS
  ,CASE WHEN OA_FLAG='N' THEN CREDIT_ACCOUNT_CLASS ELSE OA_CREDIT_ACCOUNT_CLASS  END AS CREDIT_ACCOUNT_CLASS
  ,CASE WHEN OA_FLAG='N' THEN FISCAL_PERIOD_NUMBER ELSE OA_FISCAL_PERIOD_NUMBER  END AS FISCAL_PERIOD_NUMBER
  ,RECORD_OFFSET
  ,CAST(CAST(EDW_CREATE_DTM AS VARCHAR(19)) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM1
  ,USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER
  ,CAST(CAST(EDW_CREATE_DTM AS VARCHAR(19)) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM
  ,USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER
  ,CASE WHEN RETRO_FLAG='YES' THEN  'Y'
   ELSE 'N'
   END RETRO_FLAG /*Q2DEC Meraki Change by anusha on 01/11*/ 
  FROM $$STGDB.ST_SI_CG1_MERK_LINE_CUR_PERIOD ST
--WHERE CAST(EDW_CREATE_DTM AS DATE) > (SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.CTL_ETL_LAST_EXTRACT_DATES 
  WHERE EDW_CREATE_DTM1>= (SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.CTL_ETL_LAST_EXTRACT_DATES       
      WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID='wf_EL_CG1_XXCFIR_REV_MERK' AND TABLE_NAME='ST_SI_CG1_MERK_LINE_CUR_PERIOD')
  AND NOT EXISTS (SEL 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_CG1_XXCFIR_REV_MERK EL 
  WHERE ST.FID=EL.FID
  AND EL.KAFKA_TOPIC_NAME='CiscoMerakiRevenueTrxnLineCurrentPeriod')


UNION ALL

SELECT
  FID
  ,OPERATING_UNIT
  ,INSTANCE_NAME
  ,CURRENCY
  ,ORG_ID
  ,LEDGER_ID
  ,APPLICATION_NAME
  ,SOURCE
  ,KAFKA_TOPIC_NAME
  ,INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
  ,ITEM_NAME
  ,QUANTITY
  ,ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME
  ,TRX_NUMBER
  ,TRX_CLASS
  ,CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
  ,CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
  ,AMOUNT
  ,ACCOUNTING_RULE_DURATION
  ,UNIT_SELLING_PRICE
,CAST((CLAIM_START_DATE(DATE, FORMAT'mm/dd/yyyy')) AS TIMESTAMP(6)) AS CLAIM_START_DATE1
,CAST((CLAIM_END_DATE(DATE, FORMAT'mm/dd/yyyy')) AS TIMESTAMP(6))AS CLAIM_END_DATE1
   ,ORDER_NUMBER
   ,ORDER_LINE_ID
  ,OA_FLAG
 ,RECLAIM_VERSION
  ,TRX_CURR_CODE
  ,CONVERSION_DATE
 ,OA_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
  ,OA_ATTRIB_ID
  ,OA_ITEM_NAME
  ,OA_QUANTITY
  ,OA_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME
  ,OA_PERCENTAGE
  ,SUB_SKU_AMOUNT
  ,CAST((OA_CLAIM_START_DATE(DATE, FORMAT'mm/dd/yyyy')) AS TIMESTAMP(6)) AS OA_CLAIM_START_DATE1
  ,CAST((OA_CLAIM_END_DATE(DATE, FORMAT'mm/dd/yyyy')) AS TIMESTAMP(6))AS OA_CLAIM_END_DATE1
  ,OA_ACCOUNTING_RULE_DURATION AS OA_ACCOUNTING_DURATION
  ,CASE WHEN OA_FLAG='N' THEN NULL ELSE COALESCE(OA_SEQUENCE_ID,1) END AS OA_SEQUENCE_ID

  ,COALESCE(SEQUENCE_ID,1) AS SEQUENCE_ID
 ,CASE WHEN OA_FLAG='N' 
              THEN CAST((GL_DATE(DATE, FORMAT'mm/dd/yyyy')) AS TIMESTAMP(6))
              ELSE CAST((OA_GL_DATE(DATE, FORMAT'mm/dd/yyyy')) AS TIMESTAMP(6))
    END AS GL_DATE
  ,CASE WHEN OA_FLAG='N' THEN DEBIT_AMOUNT ELSE OA_DEBIT_AMOUNT  END AS DEBIT_AMOUNT
  ,CASE WHEN OA_FLAG='N' THEN CREDIT_AMOUNT ELSE OA_CREDIT_AMOUNT  END AS CREDIT_AMOUNT
  ,CASE WHEN OA_FLAG='N' THEN DEBIT_ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT ELSE OA_DEBIT_ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT  END AS DEBIT_ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT 
  ,CASE WHEN OA_FLAG='N' THEN CREDIT_ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT ELSE OA_CREDIT_ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT  END AS CREDIT_ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT 
  ,CASE WHEN OA_FLAG='N' THEN GL_TRANSFER_STATUS_CODE ELSE OA_GL_TRANSFER_STATUS_CODE  END AS GL_TRANSFER_STATUS_CODE
  ,CASE WHEN OA_FLAG='N' THEN 
                         CAST((GL_TRANSFER_DATE(DATE, FORMAT'mm/dd/yyyy')) AS TIMESTAMP(6))
                         ELSE 
      CAST((OA_GL_TRANSFER_DATE(DATE, FORMAT'mm/dd/yyyy')) AS TIMESTAMP(6))
   END AS GL_TRANSFER_DATE 
  ,CASE WHEN OA_FLAG='N' THEN DEBIT_CC_ID ELSE OA_DEBIT_CC_ID  END AS DEBIT_CC_ID
  ,CASE WHEN OA_FLAG='N' THEN CREDIT_CC_ID  ELSE OA_CREDIT_CC_ID  END AS CREDIT_CC_ID
  ,CASE WHEN OA_FLAG='N' THEN DEBIT_ACCOUNT_CLASS ELSE OA_DEBIT_ACCOUNT_CLASS  END AS DEBIT_ACCOUNT_CLASS
  ,CASE WHEN OA_FLAG='N' THEN CREDIT_ACCOUNT_CLASS ELSE OA_CREDIT_ACCOUNT_CLASS  END AS CREDIT_ACCOUNT_CLASS
  ,CASE WHEN OA_FLAG='N' THEN FISCAL_PERIOD_NUMBER ELSE OA_FISCAL_PERIOD_NUMBER  END AS FISCAL_PERIOD_NUMBER
  ,RECORD_OFFSET
  ,CAST(CAST(EDW_CREATE_DTM AS VARCHAR(19)) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM1
  ,USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER
  ,CAST(CAST(EDW_CREATE_DTM AS VARCHAR(19)) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM
  ,USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER
  ,CASE WHEN RETRO_FLAG='YES' THEN  'Y'
   ELSE 'N'
   END RETRO_FLAG
   /*Q2DEC Meraki Change*/
  FROM $$STGDB.ST_SI_CG1_MERK_LINE_SCHEDULE ST
--WHERE CAST(EDW_CREATE_DTM AS DATE) > (SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.CTL_ETL_LAST_EXTRACT_DATES  
WHERE EDW_CREATE_DTM1 >= (SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.CTL_ETL_LAST_EXTRACT_DATES  
      WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID='wf_EL_CG1_XXCFIR_REV_MERK' AND TABLE_NAME='ST_SI_CG1_MERK_LINE_SCHEDULE')
  AND NOT EXISTS (SEL 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_CG1_XXCFIR_REV_MERK EL 
  WHERE ST.FID=EL.FID
  AND EL.KAFKA_TOPIC_NAME='CiscoMerakiRevenueTrxnLineSchedule')
